remaining_tasks.progress: 4 background gsd-project-researcher agents launched (STACK, FEATURES, ARCHITECTURE, PITFALLS). Outputs not yet on disk — agents may or may not have completed; session was paused before completion signal.

decisions.decision: Claude Haiku via Anthropic SDK para síntese
decisions.rationale: Custo baixo, suficiente para síntese curta em PT

decisions.decision: Docker Compose com cron interno ao container app
Postar o melhor disponível mesmo sem cluster forte
Tom jornalístico neutro, post = síntese + link + hashtags
decisions.rationale: Marca @ByteRelevant foca em relevância factual; hashtags para discoverability

decisions.decision: .env + env_file para secrets, logs JSON em arquivo (sem alertas ativos v1)
Config workflow: YOLO, standard granularity, parallel, commit planning, research+plan_check+verifier, balanced models
decisions.rationale: Projeto real merece gates; sonnet/haiku bom custo-benefício

next_action: Check .planning/research/ for STACK.md, FEATURES.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, PITFALLS.md. If present, spawn gsd-research-synthesizer for SUMMARY.md. If missing, re-spawn the 4 gsd-project-researcher agents (prompts in .planning/.continue-here.md). Then proceed to REQUIREMENTS.md and ROADMAP.md.
context_notes: Greenfield Python project tech-news-synth. User is building an automated tech-news curation agent that posts to @ByteRelevant on X every 2h. Full scope and constraints captured in .planning/PROJECT.md. Workflow in YOLO mode — can auto-approve gates when resuming. Next GSD workflow stages: requirements → roadmap → /gsd-plan-phase 1.
